title: Mission Objective
description: Generates a mission objective as an imperative clause.
entries: Eliminate the one giving the orders
Recover what was taken before it's moved
Uncover who is really behind it
Hold a place long enough for it to matter
Get someone through hostile ground alive
Cut off the source of their power
Destroy something that should not exist
Deliver a message no one wants to hear
Free those being held against their will
Plant a lie deep enough to take root
Steal proof that the story is false
Broker peace between two who want blood
Escort a witness to somewhere safe
Find the way in that no one else has found
Buy back what was sold out from under you
Silence a threat before it can speak
Map the ground before the others arrive
Turn one of theirs to your side
Retrieve a body and the truth it carries
Sabotage the plan on its final night
Guard a secret through a single dangerous meeting
Track a trail that has already gone cold
Convince the doubtful that you can be trusted
Undo something you set in motion yourself
